The US Dollar just made a new 52-week high.

Most investors see that and immediately assume it's bearish for stocks.

History disagrees.

Since 1971, the S&P 500 has gained an average of 9.2% over the following 12 months after the dollar hit a new 52-week high.

Maybe we're

And that's why Grant is a great follow.

I'm feeling a little better about the Dollar
